name: Carrot and Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix the first six ingredients (top three on each side).
3. Add carrots, fruit, and nuts, distributing evenly.
4. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
5. In another bowl, beat egg whites lightly and mix in milk, molasses, and oil.
6. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients all at once and stir just until moistened.
7. Pour batter into a lightly oiled or paper-lined muffin tin, filling each cavity about 3/4 full.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes. Makes 18 muffins.
~Nutritional Information: Each muffin contains approximately 133 calories, 3.6 grams of protein, 21.4 grams of carbohydrates, 5.1 grams of total fat, 0.7 grams of dietary fiber, 102 mg of sodium, 329 mg of potassium, 68 mg of calcium, and 2.1 mg of iron.
~Recipe Source: The New American Diet by Connor & Connor
